Section 1 — Data Preparation

What We Did

303 patients · 13 clinical features · 6 missing values imputed · 19 outliers flagged

📋
1.1 — Data Understanding
Dataset Profile
303 rows × 14 columns from UCI Cleveland. Binary/categorical: sex, cp, fbs, restecg, exang, slope, ca, thal. Numerical: age, trestbps, chol, thalach, oldpeak.
float64 × 13 + int64 × 1
🧹
1.2 — Data Cleaning
6 Missing Values Fixed
ca had 4 missing (?), thal had 2 missing. Imputed with median. thal re-encoded (3→0, 6→1, 7→2). cp shifted 1–4 → 0–3. IQR flagged 19 outlier rows.
RobustScaler · Winsorization
📈
1.3.1 — Univariate
Skewness Detected
chol (skew=+1.13) and oldpeak (skew=+1.26) were right-skewed. Log1p transform applied. age and thalach were approximately normal.
log1p(chol) · log1p(oldpeak)
🔥
1.3.2 — Bivariate
Top Correlated Features
thal, ca, exang, oldpeak showed highest correlation with target. Asymptomatic chest pain (cp=3) had 80%+ disease rate. Max HR inversely linked to disease.
thal · ca · exang · oldpeak
🧠
1.3.3 — Multivariate
High VIF in Numerics
VIF analysis showed high multicollinearity (trestbps VIF=56, age VIF=37). Expected in clinical data. Managed via RobustScaler and ensemble models. PCA needs 10 components for 90% variance.
PCA · VIF Analysis
⚖️
1.4 — Preprocessing
SMOTE Balancing
164 no-disease vs 139 disease patients. SMOTE applied → 164 vs 164. RobustScaler chosen over StandardScaler for outlier robustness. 80/20 stratified train-test split.
262 train · 66 test

Feature Importance — Random Forest
01
thal — Thalassemia
Blood disorder type · strongest predictor
02
ca — Major Vessels
Fluoroscopy colored vessels (0–3)
03
cp — Chest Pain Type
Asymptomatic = 80%+ disease rate
04
oldpeak — ST Depression
Exercise-induced ST depression (mm)
05
thalach — Max Heart Rate
Inversely correlated with disease
06
exang — Exercise Angina
Exercise-induced angina (yes/no)
Implementation

Key Code

Core logic snippets from the notebook.

model_results.txt
$ python heart_project.py
─────────────────────────
CLASSIFICATION RESULTS
─────────────────────────
Random Forest:
Accuracy : 0.8788
F1-Score : 0.8788
ROC-AUC : 0.9458

5-Fold CV AUC:
0.9231 ± 0.0191

K-Means (K=2):
Silhouette: 0.1864
DBI : 1.9458
# IQR Outlier Flagging
for col in num_cols:
  Q1 = df[col].quantile(0.25)
  Q3 = df[col].quantile(0.75)
  IQR = Q3 - Q1
  lo = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
  hi = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
  flag = (df[col] < lo) | (df[col] > hi)
  outlier_flags[col] = flag

# Random Forest
rf = RandomForestClassifier(
  n_estimators=300,
  max_features='sqrt',
  class_weight='balanced',
  random_state=42
)
rf.fit(X_train, y_train)
auc = roc_auc_score(y_test, proba)
